messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about money. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
Ecclesiastes 5:10 | Give not thine gold for much words; nor thy labour to increase money.
Proverbs 22:7 | The rich shall have rule over the poor; and the borrower is servant unto the lender.
Matthew 6:24 | Ye cannot serve God, and mammon also.
Acts 20:35 | For I preferved you in all things, that ye might learn by me to work with your own hands.
Galatians 6:7 | Sow not corruption amongst men; yet have patience towards them of the world?
